mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_tool_execution_journal ( execution_key, session_id, turn_id, approval_id, assistant_message_id, tool_call_id, tool_name, argument_hash, effect_class, attempt, state, safe_error_code, response_message_id, response_hash, dispatched_at, call_deadline_ms, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{executionKey}, #{sessionId}, #{turnId}, #{approvalId},
CAST(#{assistantMessageId} AS uuid) NULL , #{toolCallId}, #{toolName}, #{argumentHash}, #{effectClass}, #{attempt}, #{state}, #{safeErrorCode},
CAST(#{responseMessageId} AS uuid) NULL , #{responseHash}, #{dispatchedAt}, #{callDeadlineMs}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_tool_execution_journal WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tool_execution_journal SET state = 'PREPARED', attempt = #{nextAttempt}, safe_error_code = #{safeErrorCode}, dispatched_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE execution_key = #{executionKey} AND state = 'DISPATCHING' AND attempt = #{expectedAttempt}
